question:
What is the primary societal value of studying history?
A) It allows people to memorize dates to win trivia games.
B) It ensures that old technologies are always used instead of new ones.
C) It provides context for current events and helps societies avoid repeating past mistakes.
D) It proves that humanity has never made any real progress.
